binary_checks: Did the answer identify evaluation-and-governance weakness around whole-program outcomes, not just battery deployment as the main bottleneck, not merely a symptom or generic concern?
Did the answer name at least one real slow variable such as evaluation architecture, cross-entity coordination, data standards, and value-for-money discipline?
Did the top intervention target whole-program measurement and coordination fixes directly?
Did the answer avoid generic distractors such as asset counts alone, more funding rounds, or schedule-only acceleration?
Did the answer include at least one concrete early-warning signal?

slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.1: One real slow variable or mixed with symptoms
slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.2: Multiple real slow variables, clearly separated from symptoms

distractor_resistance_0_to_2.2: Stays focused on the real constraint
